name: Mailchimp
description: Manage email lists, campaigns, and automation in Mailchimp. Update the base URL to your data center (us1.api.mailchimp.com, us6, etc.) from your account URL.

auth.hint: Get your API key from Mailchimp → Account → Extras → API Keys. In the API Key field enter: Basic <base64 of "anystring:YOUR_API_KEY">. Also update the base URL to match your data center (check your account URL).

tools.name: list_audiences
tools.description: List all Mailchimp audience lists with their name, member count, and open rates.

tools.name: get_audience_members
tools.description: List subscribers in a Mailchimp audience with their email, status, and tags.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter: subscribed, unsubscribed, cleaned, or pending

tools.name: list_campaigns
tools.description: List email campaigns with their type, subject, send date, and performance stats.

params.name: status
params.description: Filter by status: sent, draft, scheduled

tools.name: get_campaign_report
tools.description: Get performance stats for a sent campaign: opens, clicks, bounces, and unsubscribes.
